name: Vegetable Curry from Nepal
recipeInstructions:
6 Potatoes, unpeeled and diced
- Add to the pot
1 Tablespoon Peanut oil for flavor
- When almost tender, add
4 1/2 Broccoli, cauliflower, or cabbage, chopped
1 Salt and pepper to taste
2 Tomatoes
1 teaspoon Curry powder
Cover and simmer until all vegetables are tender. Serve over rice.
